title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CCAvenue Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CCAvenue Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CCAvenue Global Group:
CCAvenue Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
